Variable.Name: SapAXLDestDir
Variable.Value: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Setting destination folder according to bitness of operating system and installed microsoft office" szAXLDestDirx86 = "%SapAXLDestDirx86%" szAXLDestDirx64 = "%SapAXLDestDirx64%" If "%MSExcel2007Exists%" = "TRUE" Or "%MSExcel2013Exists%" = "TRUE" Or "%MSExcel2010Exists%" = "TRUE" Or "%MSExcel2016Exists%" = "TRUE" Then If "%WOW64MODE%" = "TRUE" And (("%MSO2010Is64Bit%" = "TRUE") Or ("%MSO2013Is64Bit%" = "TRUE") Or ("%MSO2016Is64Bit%" = "TRUE")) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Found 64 Bit operating system and 64 Bit Office, destination folder is '" + szAXLDestDirx64 + "'." NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLDestDir", szAXLDestDirx64 NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLIs64Bit", "TRUE" Else If %WOW64Mode% = TRUE Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Found 64 bit operating system, but office is installed in 32 bit, using 32 bit destination folder: '" + szAXLDestDirx86 + "'." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Found 32 bit operating system, using 32 bit destination folder: '" + szAXLDestDirx86 + "'." End If NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLDestDir", szAXLDestDirx86 NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLIs64Bit", "FALSE" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Could not found any supported Microsoft Excel version, cannot set destination folder!" End If

Variable.Name: SapAXLDestDir_Temp
Variable.Value: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Checking if SapAXLDestDir is set to a valid path or UNDEFINED..." CurrentPath = NwEngine.Variables.GetValue("SapAXLDestDir") If CurrentPath = "UNDEFINED" Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Something is wrong here, SapAXLDestDir is set to UNDEFINED, this needs to be overwritten..." szAXLDestDirx86 = "%SapAXLDestDirx86%" szAXLDestDirx64 = "%SapAXLDestDirx64%" If "%MSExcel2007Exists%" = "TRUE" Or "%MSExcel2013Exists%" = "TRUE" Or "%MSExcel2010Exists%" = "TRUE" Or "%MSExcel2016Exists%" = "TRUE" Then If "%WOW64MODE%" = "TRUE" And (("%MSO2010Is64Bit%" = "TRUE") Or ("%MSO2013Is64Bit%" = "TRUE") Or ("%MSO2016Is64Bit%" = "TRUE")) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Found 64 Bit operating system and 64 Bit Office, destination folder is '" + szAXLDestDirx64 + "'." NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLDestDir", szAXLDestDirx64 NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLIs64Bit", "TRUE" Else If %WOW64Mode% = TRUE Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Found 64 bit operating system, but office is installed in 32 bit, using 32 bit destination folder: '" + szAXLDestDirx86 + "'." Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Found 32 bit operating system, using 32 bit destination folder: '" + szAXLDestDirx86 + "'." End If NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLDestDir", szAXLDestDirx86 NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLIs64Bit", "FALSE" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Could not found any supported Microsoft Excel version, cannot set destination folder!" End If Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: SapAXLDestDir is set to a path, everything OK." End If

Variable.Name: SapAXLVSTOInstallerPath
Variable.Variable: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Checking for VSTOinstaller.exe..." If %SapAXLIs64Bit% = TRUE Then szPath = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%COMMONPROGRAMFILES64%\Microsoft Shared\VSTO\10.0\VSTOInstaller.exe") If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist(szPath) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Found VSTOInstaller.exe (64 Bit) here: " & szPath NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLVSTOInstallerPath", szPath Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Could not find VSTOInstaller.exe, vsto cannot be registered!" End If Else szPath = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%COMMONPROGRAMFILES32%\Microsoft Shared\VSTO\10.0\VSTOInstaller.exe") If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist(szPath) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Found VSTOInstaller.exe (32 Bit) here: " & szPath NwEngine.Variables.AppendDefaultValue "SapAXLVSTOInstallerPath", szPath Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "AXL Script: Could not find VSTOInstaller.exe, vsto cannot be registered!" End If End If
